category_title: Students who exhibit physical distress and avoidance behaviors (crying, falling to floor) in loud environments
scenario_title: Catching task in a highly distracted environment
minimal_context: The student and tutor are practicing catching a ball while standing on a spot in a busy environment with other kids and noises.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's check the picture schedule to see what is next.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Catch. (Gets the picture schedule out, then stands on a spot)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Hands out, look at the ball.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Catches with two hands, then squeezes the ball)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's try another one. Hands out.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looking everywhere, easily distracted by the million noises and people coming in and out)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's check the picture schedule to see what is next.

STUDENT: Catch. (Gets the picture schedule out, then stands on a spot)

TUTOR: Hands out, look at the ball.

STUDENT: (Catches with two hands, then squeezes the ball)

TUTOR: Let's try another one. Hands out.

STUDENT: (Looking everywhere, easily distracted by the million noises and people coming in and out)

task.content: Practicing catching a ball while standing on a spot

context.environment: Environment that has a lot of distractions in it, a lot of kids, a million noises and people coming in and out
context.materials: Picture schedule, ball, spot to stand on
context.social_setting: One-on-one with teacher (S), other kids in the environment

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: In an environment that has a lot of distractions in it, a lot of kids or a lot of things going on

behavior_patterns.condition: When checking what's next on the picture schedule
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Gets the picture schedule out again, what's next. St says Catch. St stands on a spot.
